query: Alien Romulus sequel official release date announcement

{"query":"Alien Romulus sequel official release date announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1362,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alien:_Romulus","title":"Alien: Romulus - Wikipedia","content":"At CinemaCon in April 2019, 20th Century Studios (then-named 20th Century Fox) announced plans to produce future Alien films.
Alien: Romulus premiered in Los Angeles on August 12, 2024, and was theatrically released in the United States by 20th Century Studios on August 16.
After the acquisition of 21st Century Fox by The Walt Disney Company, 20th Century Fox confirmed at the 2019 CinemaCon that future Alien films were in development.
In March 2023, Isabela Merced was set to co-star opposite Spaeny.
Later that month, David Jonsson, Archie Renaux, Spike Fearn, and Aileen Wu joined the cast.
Alien: Romulus was originally intended to be released directly on Hulu, but Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures moved the film to a theatrical release shortly before filming commenced.
Alien: Romulus was released through digital download on October 15, 2024, and was released on Ultra HD Blu-ray, Blu-ray, and DVD on December 3, by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment.
The film also received a limited release on VHS on the same date, making it the first installment in the series to receive an official release on the format since Alien vs.
Alien: Romulus grossed $105.3 million in the United States and Canada, and $245.5 million in other territories, for a worldwide total of $350.9 million."},{"url":"https://scified.com/news/alien-romulus-2-announcement-from-20th-century-studios-alien-day-did-get-teaser-alien-isolation-2","title":"No Alien: Romulus 2 announcement from 20th Century Studios for Alien Day, but we did get a teaser for Alien: Isolation 2! | Scified.com","content":"While the acknowledgements and merchandise offerings were great, many were holding out hope that 20th Century Studios would use the commemorative day as the launch point to announce the next Alien movie – the Alien: Romulus sequel that's supposedly in development."},{"url":"https://movieweb.com/alien-romulus-sequel-michael-sarnoski/","title":"'Alien: Romulus' Sequel Eying 'A Quiet Place' Director Michael Sarnoski","content":"Mar 12, 2026 — Alien: Earth Season 2 is expected to begin in summer 2026. This likely means that Season 2 will likely air in 2027.
It was no surprise that a sequel would be announced, but many were shocked when Romulus director Fede Álvarez revealed he would not be returning to helm the next entry.
Sarnoski's next film, The Death of Robin Hood, is scheduled to open in theaters on Jun.
Coincidently, that might be beneficial to 20th Century Studios and 20th Century Television, as filming for Alien: Earth Season 2 is expected to begin in summer 2026."},{"url":"https://weylanduplink.com/lore/alien-romulus-sequel-everything-we-know","title":"Alien: Romulus 2 - Everything we know about the next Alien movie! | Alien Lore","content":"As of October 24th, 2024 it was announced officially by 20th Century Studios that the studio had begun preparations for another Alien sequel, following on from Fede Alvarez's Alien: Romulus, which took place between Ridley Scott’s Alien and James Cameron's Aliens.
June 2025, Fede Alvarez revealed Alien: Romulus 2 begins filming October, 2025!
As of September 4th, 2025 Fede Alvarez announced his departure from directing Alien: Romulus 2.
If the sequel is on a similar schedule, it's very possible the next Alien movie could be eyeing a release date window around March, 2027, unless the studio options for a summer blockbuster release again.
An official release date has yet to be announced.
Given Alien: Romulus' financial success at the global box office, it's safe to assume the sequel will also release in cinemas rather than a streaming exclusive, however 20th Century Studios have not yet stated so.
Expect more updates to follow as we learn more!"}]}
